Video.summary: Private eye Tony turns his sights on his old department.
Video.title: Scali, P.I.

Video.summary: Tony suspects the head of a shelter is murdering young runaways; Rachel takes an out-of-town job.
Video.title: Suffer The Children, Part 1

Video.summary: Rachel kidnaps a young boy whom she suspects witnessed a murder.
Video.title: The Lady Vanishes

Video.summary: After shooting a dangerous armed robber, a cop is accused of murdering an unarmed man.
Video.title: Ghost

Video.summary: Tony sets out to trap a serial rapist whose victims are young blind women. Meanwhile, Rachel makes a surprising investment in art.
Video.title: Sight Unseen

Video.summary: Tony recovers from an embarrassing accusation to tighten the investigation of Ennis; Rachel struggles with the conflicts of her new job.
Video.title: Suffer The Children, Part 2

Video.summary: Tony helps a friend cope with his wife's death during a burglary case, while David loses his gift money.
Video.title: A Christmas Story

Video.summary: Tony's former partner seeks revenge for a long jail sentence.
Video.title: Revenge

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: The Anti-Commish

Video.summary: Stella Stevens guest stars as a reclusive former movie queen -- and one of Tony's all-time fim favorites -- who is implicated in the real-life murder of her lover.
Video.title: Eastbridge Boulevard

Video.summary: Paulie's tries to use her son's kidnapping to win back a former girlfriend.
Video.title: Nancy With The Laughing Face

Video.summary: Tony sets out to prove a mental patient isn't guilty of murder.
Video.title: Head Case

Video.summary: Reno and Cheyenne must pump themselves up when they go after a former weight lifter turned drug dealer
Video.title: Muscle Beach

Video.summary: Reno finds himself an unwilling celebrity while in San Diego tracking a "rave" party coordinator who is responsible for the near death of a teenage party goer.
Video.title: The Late Shift

Video.summary: Reno finds himself as prey in the middle of a dangerous "hunt" after he and Bobby meet up with a former protege of Sixkiller Enterprises.
Video.title: Thrill Kill

Video.summary: When Reno locates a missing teen, he finds it nearly impossible to persuade her to leave her seemingly comfortable life as a high-priced call girl until a recent "graduate" is found murdered.
Video.title: Teen Angel

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a dangerous web when his former partner turns to him for help in locating a dirty cop she testified against who has now issued a "contract" on her life.
Video.title: Den Of Thieves

Video.summary: Bobby finds his liquid assets quickly evaporating when his banker embezzles 150 million dollars and heads to sunny Mexico.
Video.title: Rancho Escondido

Video.summary: As a pair of wealthy brothers elaborate plan to inherit their disabled mother's fortune go awry, a disgruntled alcoholic police sergeant takes a contract out on Harry's life.
Video.title: Pink Elephants

Video.summary: A cadaver found in a film producer's bed leads Tom and Cassy to investigate a string of suspicious deaths.
Video.title: Three Weeks Of The Condor

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby get more than they gambled for when they head to Las Vegas in pursuit of an escaped bank robber suffering from multiple personalities.
Video.title: Cop For A Day

Video.summary: A suicide investigation exposes a noted therapist's conspiracy to murder his wife.
Video.title: Fear & Loathing In Palm Beach

Video.summary: An investigation of a wanted killer's suicide leads Cassy to uncover the dead man's relationship with her mother.
Video.title: The Loneliest Number

Video.summary: After saving a mystery woman from an attack, Tom is drawn into a plot to kill her wealthy husband.
Video.title: Dead Again... And Again

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy investigate a series of murder attempts on a pair of conntroversial vee-jays.
Video.title: Behind The Music

Video.summary: A local artist is murdered during the theft of an Old Master's priceless drawing.
Video.title: Honor Among Thieves

Video.summary: Cassy's investigation into a hit and run death leads to aU. S. Senator's suicide.
Video.title: Strange Bedfellows
